summary: Comprehensive testing of Sugar City Sweeps platform completed. Backend APIs mostly functional with admin authentication issues. Frontend UI working well with excellent user experience and proper navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Admin endpoints returning 403 'Admin access required' despite successful admin login
critical_bugs.impact: Admin panel functionality blocked - cannot access users, stats, or transactions
critical_bugs.details: Admin login successful (returns admin role), but subsequent admin API calls fail authentication. Cookie-based JWT auth may not be persisting properly across requests.

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - BTC and Lightning addresses returned

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form submission not working - stays on registration page
ui_bugs.details: Form elements present and fillable, but submission doesn't redirect to dashboard. No error messages shown to user.

working_features.status: ✅ Working - Proper form elements with data-testids
✅ Working - Header, dual currency display, navigation tabs
✅ Working - All 7 tabs clickable (Games, Deposit, Redeem, Withdraw, History, Settings, Support)
✅ Working - Shows 7 game cards with download buttons
✅ Working - Amount field and payment methods (Stripe, Crypto, Cards)
✅ Working - Admin button accessible, all admin tabs present
✅ Working - Free credits claim button visible

design_assessment.status: ✅ Excellent - Candy/neon theme well implemented with animated background
✅ Good - Mobile menu button present for responsive design
✅ Excellent - Clear navigation, proper data-testids, intuitive layout
✅ Perfect - Sugar Tokens and Game Credits clearly separated

passed_tests: AMOE status and daily claim functionality

high_priority: Fix admin endpoint authentication - admin APIs returning 403 despite successful login. Check JWT cookie persistence in FastAPI session handling.
medium_priority: Fix registration form submission - form doesn't redirect after submission, no error feedback to user
Investigate console 401/404 errors during page loads
low_priority: Add better error handling and user feedback for failed operations

success_percentage.overall: 85% (core functionality working, admin access needs fix)
